description: Jitsi conference traces from jicofo/JVB OpenTelemetry instrumentation. Trace flow: xmpp.conference / muc.member-joined (jicofo) -> muc.participant-invite -> colibri.allocate -> colibri.request (JVB), with jingle.initiate-session -> jingle.session-accept round trips to the client.

spec.description: Rate of ConferenceIq handling in jicofo (xmpp.conference root spans)
spec.title: Conference requests

spec.description: colibri.allocate span duration quantiles: bridge selection + endpoint allocation round trip to the JVB
spec.title: Colibri allocate duration (jicofo)

spec.description: colibri.request span duration quantiles on the videobridge (colibri queue processing)
spec.title: JVB colibri.request duration

spec.description: colibri.request rate on the videobridge, split into conference creates and expires
spec.title: JVB colibri requests (create / expire)

spec.description: colibri.update-participant rate grouped by the selected bridge (session.bridge attribute)
spec.title: Participant updates by bridge

spec.description: Traces rooted at xmpp.conference. Filter with the room variable (regex). Click a trace ID to open the full conference trace.
spec.title: Recent conference traces

spec.description: muc.participant-invite spans slower than 2 seconds - slow joins worth investigating
spec.title: Slow participant invites (> 2s)

spec.description: Spans with error status across jicofo and JVB
spec.title: Recent error spans

spec.description: Rate of muc.participant-invite spans (channel allocation + jingle offer)
spec.title: Participant invites

spec.description: Rate of spans with error status across all services
spec.title: Error spans

spec.description: Conference requests vs rooms destroyed vs single-participant timeouts (jicofo)
spec.title: Conference lifecycle events

spec.description: muc.member-joined rate grouped by member.region attribute
spec.title: Member joins by region

spec.description: Rate of jingle.* spans by name (session-accept and transport-accept arrive from clients via traceparent; initiate-session/replace-transport are sent by jicofo)
spec.title: Jingle actions

spec.description: muc.participant-invite span duration quantiles: colibri allocation + jingle session-initiate, the core of join latency
spec.title: Participant invite duration

title: Jitsi Traces

spec.description: Regex filter applied to the recent conference traces table
spec.label: Room (regex)
spec.name: room
